betafeatures-auto-enroll: Si toos ah u shid inta badan astaamaha beta
betafeatures-auto-enroll-help: Qaar ka mid ah astaamaha beta waxay keeni karaan isbeddello lama filaan ah, sidaas darteed {{GENDER:|waa inaad}} si gacanta ah ugu biirtaa.
betafeatures-desc: Waxaa isticmaalaha loo ogolyahay in uu ka shaqaysiiyo ama uu hawlgab ka dhigo hab shaqaynta aan diyaarka ahayn ee shaqaysiisa wikiga
betafeatures-section-desc: Halkani {{PLURAL:$1|waa dhaqan-gelinta cusub|waa dhaqan-gelinnada cusub}} waxaa lagu qorsheeyaa ku darista {{SITENAME}}. Fadlan {{PLURAL:$1|tijaabi|tijaabiya}} kadib nagu soo kordhi aaraadaada, si ay noogu suurto gasho {{PLURAL:$1|hagaajinta|hagaajinteeda}} hadba heerka faallooyinkiina.
betafeatures-feature-autoenrolled: Astaamo si toos ah laguugu daray
mw-ui-feature-requirements-betafeatures: Hab shaqayntaan {{PLURAL:$1|hab shaqayn|hab shaqayno}} waxay u baahantahay in laga shaqaysiiyo:
mw-ui-feature-requirements-javascript: Hab shaqayntaan waxay u baahantahay JavaScript.
mw-ui-feature-requirements-skins: Hab shaqayntaan waxa ay ku shaqaysaa oo kaliya {{PLURAL:$1|qaabkaan|qaababkaan}} soo socda:
mw-ui-feature-user-count: {{PLURAL:$1|Hal isticmaale ayaa|$1 isticmaale yaal ayaa|0=malahan isticmaale}} sameeyay hab shaqayntaan.
prefs-description-betafeatures: Isku day astaamaha ugu dambeeyay ee socda oo sii jawaab celin.
